narrative:
99 Ohio House district has 79,661 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.1% D−R vs -12.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
